title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Country Delight
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
